# Generated Before / After

## Before

- `@ccd/vue-ui` root symbols in `docs/generated/api-surface-report.md` did not include `CcdTag`.
- `docs/generated/api-surface-report.json` did not expose `CcdTag` in the `@ccd/vue-ui` public API data.

## After

- `docs/generated/api-surface-report.md` includes `CcdTag` in the `@ccd/vue-ui` root symbol list.
- `docs/generated/api-surface-report.json` includes `"CcdTag"` in the `@ccd/vue-ui` export list.

## Changed Generated Files

- `docs/generated/api-surface-report.md`
- `docs/generated/api-surface-report.json`

No additional generated files were required for this lane.
